title: carex × derelicta
intro: Carex × derelicta, also known as the hybrid sedge, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Carex conica and Carex divulsa. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Carex × derelicta is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Carex × derelicta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
